name: Media Word Filter
description: Mutes filtered phrases during Jellyfin Web playback using Media Word Filter mute data. Requires the File Transformation plugin for client script injection.
overview: Server-side Media Word Filter companion: details-page profile controls, mute proxy, and next-episode prefetch. Does not modify the playback media bar.
changelog: Remove all playback media-bar / OSD injection so the player controls work normally again.
